creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sun May 29 04:49:45 UTC 2016
New revision: 416086
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/416086

Log:
  New port: net-im/ring-libclient

  Ring is a secure and distributed voice, video and chat communication
  platform that requires no centralized server and leaves the power
  of privacy in the hands of the user.

  WWW: https://ring.cx/

  PR:		209543
  Submitted by:	Yuri Victorovich <yuri@rawbw.com>
